text_to_speech.name: Text-to-Speech
text_to_speech.rationale: Three interchangeable TTS providers (OpenAI, Google, Gemini) sharing the narration-building surface
text_to_speech.description: Multi-provider TTS: narration text/SSML building, provider fallback chain, WAV assembly, duration estimation

image_generation.name: Image Generation
image_generation.rationale: OpenAI and Gemini image generation behind one scene-image prompt convention
image_generation.description: Scene image generation with OpenAI and Gemini: prompt building, base64 decode, mime/extension handling

media_storage.name: Media Storage
media_storage.rationale: Supabase storage client for generated audio/images
media_storage.description: Supabase storage client factory + config resolution for generated media

media_pipelines.name: Media Pipelines
media_pipelines.rationale: Per-format enrichment pipelines (shorts, article, deck) that wire generated media into content packs
media_pipelines.description: Format-specific pipelines: storage path conventions, signed URLs, enriching shorts/article/deck packs with generated audio and images

generation_schema.name: Generation Schemas & Prompts
generation_schema.rationale: Card/deck/scene JSON schemas and the prompts that produce them
generation_schema.description: Content generation contracts: card/deck/scene type constants, JSON schemas, scene and quiz prompt builders

idea_chat.name: Idea Chat
idea_chat.rationale: Idea-refinement chat prompt building and message normalization
idea_chat.description: Prompt assembly and context normalization for the idea chat flow

document_extraction.name: Document Extraction
document_extraction.rationale: Google Document AI OCR text extraction with JWT auth
document_extraction.description: Extract text from documents via Google Document AI: PEM key decode, access token, page chunking

job_store.name: Job Store
job_store.rationale: Generation job persistence with KV backend and proxy jobs
job_store.description: Persistent job store for long-running generation jobs: KV persistence, job cloning, proxy job records

shared_utils.name: Shared Utils
shared_utils.rationale: Text utilities, language constants, and the package export surface
shared_utils.description: Text clamping/normalization, language profiles and stopwords, package index
